model_specification_line: result = smf.ols("full_time ~ daca_eligible + age + age_sq + C(year)", data=df).fit()
sample_selection: birthplace Mexico (bpl == 200) and Hispanic-Mexican origin (hispand in {100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107})
noncitizen (citizen == 3) immigrants with positive yrimmig and arrival_age between 0 and 60
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = (birthyr between 1982 and 1996) & (yrimmig between 1900 and 2007) & (arrival_age between 0 and 15)
